title: DC-17 (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:RexBlasters-TCWCEJtB.png|thumb|right|300px|[[Clone Captain]] [[Rex]]'s dual DC-17 hand blasters]]
The '''DC-17''' is the designation of multiple weapons:
*'''Canon:'''
**[[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System]]
**[[DC-17 repeater hand blaster]]
*'''Legends:'''
**[[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System/Legends|DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System]]
**[[DC-17 hand blaster/Legends|DC-17 hand blaster]]
**[[DC-17 blaster pistol]]
**[[DC-17 shotgun]]
